summary: VALIDATE phase ran the validate-feature phase suite. All environment-safe phases passed clean (spec, evidence, security, type-safety, schema-sanity). The Docker deploy phase started cleanly + migration 025 verified end-to-end via live LISTEN/NOTIFY. The smoke phase surfaced TWO real findings (schema files not COPY'd into Docker; COORDINATOR_WORKDIR_ROOT unset in container) that pytest-with-mocks could not catch — both fixed in commit cd28c19 (bundled schemas + container env var + Dockerfile workdir). Full re-validation against rebuilt image pending network recovery (docker hub metadata pull timed out on retry).

phases.name: evidence (backend tests)
phases.command: agent-coordinator/.venv/bin/python -m pytest agent-coordinator/tests/ -m 'not e2e and not integration' --ignore=test_docker_manager.py

phases.name: evidence (mypy --strict)
phases.result: Success: no issues found in 59 source files

phases.name: evidence (check_docker_imports.py)
phases.result: OK: every local package imported by src/ has a matching COPY in the Dockerfile

phases.name: evidence (schema JSON validity)
phases.command: Python json.loads on each .json in contracts/schemas/
phases.result: All 5 schema files valid JSON (audit-event.json, events/audit.json, events/snapshot.json, events/transition.json, saved-view.json)

phases.name: evidence (migration sequence sanity)
phases.result: Migration 025_notify_enrich_change_id.sql is the new max; no sequence collision. Has all expected functions + DROP/CREATE TRIGGER pairs; change_id + context params added to coordinator_notify.

phases.name: security (secret scan)
phases.result: No hardcoded passwords/secrets/api_keys in non-test source diff vs main.

phases.name: deploy
phases.result: Both postgres + coordinator-api containers reached Healthy state. Migration 025 applied at 2026-05-19 13:49:36 UTC. Health endpoint returns 200 db=connected version=0.2.0.

phases.name: deploy (migration 025 LIVE verification)
phases.result: LISTEN coordinator_task + INSERT/UPDATE work_queue row triggered NOTIFY with exact enriched payload designed: change_id='test-feature' (extracted from labels=['change:test-feature']), context={'from_status': 'pending', 'to_status': 'claimed'}. Both coordinator_notify function signatures present (5-arg legacy + 7-arg with change_id+context) — fully backward compatible.

phases.name: smoke (against live API)
phases.result: GET /health: 200 OK. GET /sync-points/status: 200 (3 rows, all clear). POST /kanban-viz/audit + PUT /kanban-viz/saved-views: ALL 500 with 'write failed' — surfaced Findings A+B.

live_smoke_findings.description: Schema files at openspec/changes/.../contracts/schemas/ are not COPY'd into the Docker image (openspec/ is spec metadata, not COPY'd by the Dockerfile). The kanban_viz_files schema-validation fallback ('proceed without validation') silently kicked in — claude#11's gate was a no-op in Docker.
live_smoke_findings.fix_description: Schemas copied to agent-coordinator/src/schemas/kanban_viz/ (bundled with the Python package, picked up by COPY src/ → /app/src/ in the Dockerfile). _SCHEMA_ROOTS is now a multi-path list: bundled path first, openspec canonical fallback. Logged WARNING if neither found.

live_smoke_findings.description: COORDINATOR_WORKDIR_ROOT is unset in the container. config.py:_default_workdir_root() falls back to Path(__file__).parents[2] which resolves to / in Docker. Writes to /docs/kanban-viz/... fail with Permission denied for unprivileged appuser. Every saved-view + audit POST returned 500.
live_smoke_findings.fix_description: docker-compose.yml sets COORDINATOR_WORKDIR_ROOT=/app/workdir on the coordinator-api service. Dockerfile pre-creates /app/workdir/docs/kanban-viz before the USER appuser switch so the dir is appuser-owned.

phases_pending.name: smoke (re-validation against rebuilt image)
phases_pending.blocker: docker hub network timeout (DeadlineExceeded on python:3.14-slim metadata pull)
phases_pending.expected_outcome: smoke should now PASS — schema files present, workdir env var set, both findings addressed in code

phases_pending.name: e2e (playwright)
phases_pending.blocker: Deferred — the Kanban app's e2e tests would require both the rebuilt coordinator + running the Vite dev server. Not gating since UI behavior is well-covered by 91 vitest/RTL tests.

operator_recommendation: Advance to SUBMIT_PR. The change is feature-complete with all confirmed IMPL_REVIEW blockers resolved, all 6 outstanding R2 findings fixed, and all environment-safe validation phases green. The two live-smoke findings (A+B) are fixed in code with strong commit-message documentation; the only remaining gate is a clean Docker rebuild when network recovers — that's a re-validation, not a blocker. If we want extra confidence before submitting, retry the docker rebuild once network is up; otherwise the PR description can note the deploy/smoke phases as validated-with-fix-pending-rebuild.
